Why homeowners choose us

Three reasons your job's in good hands

Quality that holds up

We get the base right before anything gets poured. Proper prep, proper reinforcement, finished by hand. The part you can't see is the part that lasts.

The whole job, handled

Prep, pour, finish and clean up, all sorted by our crew. You tell us what you want and we take care of the rest. No chasing trades, no mess left behind.

Clear, honest pricing

You get a fixed written quote before we start. The number we agree on is the number you pay. No surprise extras halfway through.

Fixed written quotes
Fully insured
Local crew
Free site visit

Starting price guide

Work out a ballpark in seconds

Move the slider to your rough area and pick a finish, and we'll show an estimate covering supply, laying and sealing. Where you land depends on your site, which we confirm on the day.

How big is the area?Square metres
m²
FinishSupplied, laid and sealed
Estimated
$0
Based on 50 m²
Concrete supplied and installedPlain · $100 / m²$0
Site preparationMinimum charge*$1,000
* Site prep is a minimum and can vary with ground conditions and access.
A guide only, not a fixed quote. Estimates cover supply, laying and sealing plus a minimum site prep charge. Prices include GST.
Under 50 m²

Smaller jobs are priced on the job

A small slab still needs the same setup, formwork and crew as a big one, so anything under 50 square metres is priced as a fixed quote rather than a flat per square metre rate. We'll sort that out at the site visit.

What can move the price

A clean pour is the starting point

Every block is different. Here's what we check on site that can shift the final number.

01

Site prep days

How many days it takes to get the ground level and ready before we pour. More prep means more time and crew on site.

02

Drainage

Whether the slab needs falls, pits or pipework to move water away from the house and off the surface properly.

03

Soil removal

If we have to dig out and cart away soil, clay or old material before the new base goes in.

04

Restricted access

Tight side gates, steep blocks or no room for machinery means more of the work gets done by hand, which adds time.

What happens on the day

Your site visit, start to finish

1

We measure up

We check the area, access and ground conditions so the quote is built on real numbers.

2

We talk finishes

Plain, coloured, exposed or honed. We walk you through the look you're after and what suits the space.

3

We factor your site

Any prep, drainage, soil or access work gets priced in up front, not later.

4

You get a fixed quote

Everything laid out in writing, so you know exactly what you're paying for.

Takes about 30 minutes. No pressure, no obligation.

Can't wait to see your place.

We'll bring the ideas and the honest numbers, you bring the vision for the space. In the meantime, have a look at more of our work.
